problem: NotebookLM notebook 'The Geometry of Intelligence' synthesizes 12 YouTube sources on harness design, SkillRAE, phase memory, and model-native skills, but agent-rules lacks runtime wiring, research gates, and canonical LifeHarness mapping.
solution: Incorporate all themes via LifeHarness 4-layer docs, NotebookLM research gate skill, SkillRAE routing v2, phase-memory consolidation, TGS multi-hop wiki RAG, and embedding-space model-native pipeline (steering + SAE-lite + eval) with mandatory VERIFIED/INFERRED/UNVERIFIED claim protocol.

user_stories.description: As an operator, I can query NotebookLM and get a GO/NO-GO gate report with claim statuses before implementing harness changes.
As an agent, I route skills via SkillRAE-lite (metadata + body TF-IDF + eval history) and decompose skills into subunit graphs.
As an operator, MCP tool failures get deterministic prescreen hints before retry (LifeHarness Environment Contract).
As an agent, trajectory events consolidate to MEMORY only at density threshold (phase memory).
As an operator, wiki TGS search combines TF-IDF with multi-hop wikilink graph traversal and orphan bridging.
As an engineer, model-native transform workflow runs full embedding-space pipeline (steering, SAE-lite, baseline vs steered eval) behind MODEL_NATIVE_RUNTIME=1.

technical_decisions.decision: NotebookLM answers are untrusted input; research gate mandatory before rules/skill changes.
technical_decisions.rationale: YouTube transcript claims are UNVERIFIED until cross-checked.

technical_decisions.decision: Model-native runtime: embedding-space proxy (sentence-transformers) for fast CI; residual-stream forward hooks + PyTorch SAE via model_native_run.py run-gpu (MODEL_NATIVE_HOOK_MODEL, MODEL_NATIVE_DEVICE=cuda when available).
technical_decisions.rationale: run-gpu produces gpu_pipeline_report.json on real activations; proxy remains default when torch/CUDA absent.

execution_chain.notes: Ralph ON completed geometry incorporation slice; all issues pass.

issues.title: LifeHarness docs + MCP prescreen + failure analyzer
SkillRAE v2 rerank + skill_decompose + edit budget gate
Phase memory consolidation + REFINE debate + research-lookup extension
TGS multi-hop wiki RAG + model_native full pipeline
